zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Molyneux於1384年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，她的父親Richard Molyneux16歲，母親Ellen DeUrswick20歲。她於1399年與Thomas Clifton Esq.在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年在英國藍卡爾克里夫頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾克里夫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Molyneux于1384年出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，她的父亲Richard Molyneux16岁，母亲Ellen DeUrswick20岁。她于1399年与Thomas Clifton Esq.在英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年在英国藍卡爾克里夫頓享年56岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾克里夫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Molyneux was born in 1384, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, her father, Richard Molyneux, was 16 and her mother, Ellen DeUrswick, was 20. She married Thomas Clifton Esq. in 1399, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1440, in Clifton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Clifton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Molyneux est née en 1384, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Molyneux, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Ellen DeUrswick, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Clifton Esq. en 1399, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1440, à Clifton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Clifton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Molyneux 1384 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Molyneux 16 und ihre Mutter Ellen DeUrswick 20. Sie hat 1399 in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Clifton Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1440 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Clifton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Clifton, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Molyneux è nata il nel 1384 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Richard Molyneux, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Ellen DeUrswick, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Clifton Esq. nel 1399, nel Sefton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1440, nel Clifton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Clifton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Molyneuxが1384年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Richard Molyneuxは16歳，母Ellen DeUrswickは20歳であった。1399年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでThomas Clifton Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1440年にイギリスランカシュアイアクリフトンで56歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアクリフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Molyneux(이)가 1384년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Molyneux(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen DeUrswick(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Thomas Clifton Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 영국 랭카실르 클리프턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 클리프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Molyneux nasceu em 1384, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Molyneux, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Ellen DeUrswick, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Clifton Esq. em 1399, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1440, em Clifton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Clifton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Molyneux родилась в 1384 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Molyneux было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen DeUrswick, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Clifton Esq. в 1399 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1440 г. в местности клифтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности клифтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Molyneux nació en 1384, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Molyneux, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Ellen DeUrswick, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Thomas Clifton Esq. en 1399, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1440, en Clifton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Clifton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
